summary: Explains how to define and manage various sources from which admission leads originate, such as direct walk-ins, newspaper advertisements, Google ads, websites, or third-party integrations. This setup allows for tracking lead origins and can include an optional 'reference' field.
navigation: Admission module > Admission Setup > Admission Master > (Source part)
steps: Navigate to the "Source part" within Admission Master.
Enter the name of the lead source (e.g., "Direct Walk-in", "Newspaper Ad", "Google Ad", "Website", "CollegeDuniya").
(Optional) Enable the "reference" field if you wish to capture additional reference details when adding a lead.
important_notes: Defining sources helps in analyzing the effectiveness of different marketing and outreach efforts.
The 'reference' field provides an additional option to specify how a lead was referred.
questions: How do I add new lead sources in the Admission module?
Where can I track the origin of my admission leads?
What is the purpose of the 'reference' field in lead source setup?
